Package com.langfuse.client.resources.commons.types

Interface IBaseScore

All Known Subinterfaces:
IBooleanScore, ICategoricalScore, ICorrectionScore, INumericScore
All Known Implementing Classes:
BaseScore, BooleanScore, CategoricalScore, CorrectionScore, GetScoresResponseDataBoolean, GetScoresResponseDataCategorical, GetScoresResponseDataCorrection, GetScoresResponseDataNumeric, NumericScore
